About: It is about responding to the challenges of contemporary society and politics.
Affects: It affects the challenges of contemporary society and politics.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Catholic social teaching.
It is associated with neo-scholasticism.
It is associated with the Neo-Calvinist tradition within Christianity.
It is associated with Lutherans.
It is associated with Pentecostals.
It is associated with the social question surrounding capitalism and the working class.
It is associated with the tensions between church and state.
It is associated with modern welfare states.
It is associated with the European Union.
It is associated with former communist states suffering from corruption and stagnation.
ConsistsOf: It consists of Christian social teaching.
It consists of Catholic social teaching.
It consists of neo-scholasticism.
It consists of the Neo-Calvinist tradition within Christianity.
It consists of views held by liberals, conservatives and socialists within a wider framework of moral and Christian principles.
It consists of traditional moral values.
It consists of opposition to secularization.
It consists of opposition to state atheism.
It consists of a view of the evolutionary development of society.
It consists of an emphasis on law and order.
CreatedTo: It was created to reconcile Catholicism with democracy.
It was created to answer the "social question" surrounding capitalism and the working class.
It was created to resolve the tensions between church and state.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in Latin America.
HasA: It has a "slightly regulated market economy".
It has an effective social security system.
It has a social market economy.
It has a "ecumenical unity achieved on the religious level against the atheism of the government in the Communist countries".
It has a view of the evolutionary development of society.
It has an emphasis on law and order.
It has an emphasis on human rights.
It has an emphasis on individual initiative.
It has an emphasis on the fact that the individual is part of a community and has duties towards it.
It has the principle of stewardship.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the reconciliation of Catholicism with democracy.
It is characterized by addressing the social question surrounding capitalism and the working class.
It is characterized by resolving tensions between church and state.
It is characterized by building modern welfare states.
